sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state to see if the white area now connects with the gap.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current objects:")
for n in seg:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'b', 'N', 'B', 'W'):
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check barrier area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nBarrier area (rows 38-45, cols 20-40):")
for i in range(38, 46):
    print(f"  Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][20:40]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
